result.stdout:
dotnet-i18n-translate 1.1.1+a0c3eb897c2e76224d0ca3f1b8390429408832a9
Copyright (C) 2026 Steven Thuriot

  -v, --verbose     (Default: false) Turns on verbose logging

  -l, --language    (Default: en) The language to start from

  -t, --target      The target language. If unset, all languages will be
                    selected.

  -a, --authkey     Required. DeepL Auth Key. If not set, tries to use
                    DeepLAuthKey environment variable instead. Required if no
                    such variable exists.

  -k, --key         Specific key to translate. If it already exists it will be
                    overwritten.

  --validate        (Default: false) Only validate without actually translating.

  --help            Display this help screen.

  --version         Display version information.
